prestazioni: ES9J4 3.0L V6 (207hp stock) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, 60mm compressor inducer) with a custom Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU and a bespoke intercooler setup from Bell Intercoolers (450x220x76mm core, 600hp-rated).

Full forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from JE Pistons, paired with ARP L19 head studs and a custom baffled oil pan from Peterson Fluid Systems (4.5L capacity).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (24-way adjustable damping, 50mm front/45mm rear spring rates) and a full polybush kit from SuperPro (part numbers SPF1325K, SPF1326K, SPF1327K for front/rear subframes and control arms), paired with Powerflex Black Series bushings for the rear trailing arms (PF99-5035).
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a modified Peugeot Sport 406 Coupe WRC aero kit (front splitter, rear diffuser, and side skirts) with carbon fiber overfenders from Seibon Carbon (part numbers CF-PE406-010, CF-PE406-011) to fit 9.5x18 ET20 front and 10.5x18 ET25 rear BBS CH-R II wheels (gold finish).

Full custom interior retrim with Recaro Sportster CS seats (Schroth 6-point harnesses) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip), paired with a custom roll cage from Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in, 6-point with door bars).

Exterior lighting upgrade with Hella Micro DE fog lights (55W H3 bulbs) and a custom LED taillight conversion using Osram LEDriving SL bulbs (P21/5W, 6000K), paired with a full de-chroming and 3M Matte Anthracite vinyl wrap (S7583).
